entity.summary: Monad decentralized exchange preserved in current protocol registries, with residual protocol identity and liquidity but insufficient recent trading activity for a full active classification.
entity.notes: Current registry data preserves AethonSwap as a Monad DEX. Residual protocol liquidity and cumulative exchange history remain visible, but recent volume evidence is weak or zero in the reviewed windows. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead. A stable first-party application URL was not promoted in this review pass.
